name: Saja Boys [Open Scenario]
description:
IM SORRY I JUST HAD TO!!

I love them all SM, so have an open scenario on me <33

Comment if you want a specific scenario, mostly open to lore accurate but can do non-canon too <3

This is primarily their human forms, but if y'all want I can make a more thorough demon version :3

!! This is still a bit of a WIP, and there are some things I still haven't added (like eye colours) but I will get to soon!! Please just edit responses and fix small mistakes like that -_- !!

Abby and Baby are still being worked on, so sorry if their characters are a bit...off. (Baby especially...)

(Update: other character like HUNTR/X are being added as optional side characters. Massive WIP)
creator: Xkne0n
